brand.name: Bahasa Indonesia
brand.fullName: Shanghai Zhang Xiaoqiang Enterprise Consulting Firm
brand.tagline: Your Loyal and Reliable Global Partner

hero.title: Empowering Businesses to Conquer Global Markets
hero.subtitle: From market entry strategy to operational implementation, we provide comprehensive overseas consulting services. AI-powered, resource-driven, making faster and more precise decisions for your global expansion.

about.p1_desc: Structure the most critical pre-entry questions: where first, by which path, and whether it is worth funding.
about.p2_desc: Bring regulation, claims, dosage-form, ingredient and policy barriers into the first decision layer.
about.p3_title: Generate structured output before expert escalation
about.p3_desc: The platform gives the first structured judgment; complex projects then move into expert review and advisory design.
about.p4_title: Not a content site, but a decision system
about.p4_desc: Users are not here to browse an agency website; they are here to complete an actionable globalization judgment.
about.evidence1: The platform organizes outputs around market priority, entry complexity, channel fit, risk exposure and the next best action
about.evidence2: Built primarily for TCM, supplements, Hanfang skincare, functional products and medical devices
about.evidence3: AI is the first decision layer and expert service is the escalation layer, not the other way around
about.sixLayersTitle: Six value layers of the diagnosis engine
about.sixLayersSubtitle: The platform is not a pile of features. It is structured around decision-making and qualification.
about.sixLayersSubtitleEn: Unlike a traditional agency website, this layer does not explain what we can do in the abstract. It explains how the platform breaks a complex globalization problem into outputs that can be judged, compared and escalated.
about.approachTitle: Let AI produce the first-layer judgment, then decide whether expert escalation is justified.
about.step1Title: Let users complete a real judgment first
about.step1Desc: The product should surface market, entry and risk judgments before asking users to read a long agency story.
about.step2Desc: Every module must answer what the conclusion is, what supports it and what should happen next.
about.step3Title: Only escalate qualified projects into expert review
about.step3Desc: The platform handles the first layer of filtering so human experts focus on complex, worthwhile opportunities.
about.viewProofCases: See how the logic is proven by real projects
about.notAgencyHomepage: This is not an agency homepage. It is a decision system for TCM global expansion.
about.notAgencyHomepageEn: The purpose of this platform is not to display more capabilities. It is to move the real pre-entry decisions upstream: which market deserves priority, which pathway is more viable, and which risks might stop the project before resources are committed.
about.platformPurpose: We redesigned the website not to display more capabilities, but to front-load the decisions that enterprises must make before going global.
about.platformPurposeEn: We redesigned the website not to display more capabilities, but to front-load the decisions that enterprises must make before going global: which market is a priority, which entry pathway is more reasonable, and which risks might prevent the project from continuing.
about.platformOutcome: Only after the platform has produced a structured judgment should users move into sample reports, expert review and deeper advisory services.
about.platformOutcomeEn: Only after the platform has produced a structured judgment should users move into sample reports, expert review and deeper advisory services.

services.diagnosisEngineTitle: Decide whether this move is worth doing before deciding how to do it.
services.diagnosisEngineTitleEn: Decide whether this move is worth doing before deciding how to do it.
services.diagnosisEngineDesc: For TCM, supplements, Hanfang skincare and health products, the system gives a go / wait / escalate judgment first, then reveals market, entry, and execution evidence.
services.diagnosisEngineDescEn: For TCM, supplements, Hanfang skincare and health products, the system gives a go / wait / escalate judgment first, then reveals market, entry, and execution evidence.
services.intakeStageTitle: Provide only the high-leverage inputs needed for a first-pass judgment
services.cap_market_priority_desc: Compare target markets by potential, barriers and sequencing instead of relying on intuition alone.
services.cap_entry_complexity_desc: Expose the real pathway constraints across formulation, ingredients, labeling, claims and registration before investment.
services.cap_diagnosis_summary_desc: Turn fragmented AI outputs into an executive-readable layer of summaries, conclusions, evidence and next actions.
services.cap_followup_desc: Not a generic chatbot, but a contextual explainer that continues the diagnosis around the current result.
services.cap_sample_proof_desc: Use real engagements and replayable cases to prove the logic instead of relying on agency-style claims.
services.cap_expert_upgrade_desc: Route complex, high-stakes and high-budget projects into expert review instead of pushing every lead into the same form.

hero2.tagline: AI platform for TCM global expansion decisions
hero2.subtitle: Global Expansion Intelligence Platform
hero2.titlePart2Gradient: if your TCM product should go global
hero2.description: ZXQ turns market priority, entry complexity, channel fit and project risk into one AI decision flow so TCM, supplement, Hanfang skincare and health-product teams can evaluate opportunities before committing serious resources.
hero2.q1: Which market should you enter first?
hero2.q2: How hard will compliance and entry be?
hero2.q3: Is this opportunity worth funding now?
hero2.trust1: Get an initial decision in 3 minutes
hero2.trust2: Assess market, compliance, cost, channels and risk in one flow
hero2.trust3: Route qualified projects into expert review
hero2.opportunityScoreText: Identify which market-product combination deserves priority investment.
hero2.entryComplexityText: Expose pathway, labeling, ingredient and policy barriers upfront.
hero2.nextBestActionText: Recommend the path forward and whether expert review is needed.
hero2.diagnoseFirst: Diagnose first, then decide whether to escalate to experts

diagnosis.intakeLabel: Provide only the high-leverage inputs needed for a first-pass judgment
diagnosis.strategicDesc: Once the inputs are complete, this area will produce a unified go / wait / escalate judgment.
diagnosis.pathwayLabel: Narrative evidence instead of scattered tools
diagnosis.pathwayDesc: The evidence layer will be auto-composed after diagnosis. Users no longer need to navigate six separate tool tabs.
diagnosis.qualificationLabel: Let the system decide whether expert escalation is justified
diagnosis.qualificationDesc: The system will use budget, stage, validation, and complexity to output an escalation recommendation.
diagnosis.followupLabel: Continue from the diagnosis, not from a blank chat
diagnosis.nextActionDesc: Continue self-serve diagnosis and low-cost validation, then escalate once the key assumptions are clearer.
diagnosis.expertReviewH: Use the platform first, then escalate high-value projects into expert review.
diagnosis.expertReviewDesc: This is not a generic contact form. It is meant for teams with a clearer market hypothesis, budget range or blocking issue who need deeper pathway judgment.
diagnosis.expertReviewCardTitle: For complex, high-barrier and high-commitment globalization projects
diagnosis.expertReviewCardDesc: The platform handles first-pass diagnosis; experts focus on projects worth deeper investment.
diagnosis.recommendComplete: We recommend completing the AI diagnosis before requesting expert review. The platform handles first-pass filtering; experts handle the truly complex questions.
diagnosis.applyExpertReview: Request expert review for your project
